name: PT Duta Intidaya Tbk
summary: PT Duta Intidaya Tbk operates as a beauty and health retailer in Indonesia. The company offers medicine, pharmacy goods, medical and wellness equipment, personal and skin care products, perfume and cosmetics, baby products, and general merchandise in stores and pharmacies. It also trades in food and beverages. In addition, the company acts as an agent, representative, sole agent, distributor, and purveyor, as well as a franchise and supplier of various traded goods. As of December 31, 2019, the company operated a network of 140 stores in Java and Bali Island, Kalimantan, Yogyakarta, Banten, Jakarta, Sumatera, and Sulawesi under the Watsons brand. PT Duta Intidaya Tbk also operates online stores at Shopee.com, Lazada.com, Blibli.com, and Bukalapak.com, as well as at Halodoc platform and bima+ App. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Duta Intidaya Tbk is a subsidiary of Total Alliance Holdings Limited.
